discovery_confirm.description: A BSB-Lan device was discovered at {host}. Please provide credentials if required.
discovery_confirm.title: BSB-Lan device discovered

reauth_confirm.description: The BSB-Lan integration needs to re-authenticate with {name}
reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your BSB-Lan device.
data_description.passkey: The passkey for your BSB-Lan device.
data_description.password: The password for your BSB-Lan device.
data_description.port: The port number of your BSB-Lan device.
data_description.username: The username for your BSB-Lan device.

user.description: Set up your BSB-Lan device to integrate with Home Assistant.
user.title: Connect to the BSB-Lan device

entry_not_found.message: The BSB-Lan config entry was not found

entry_not_loaded.message: The BSB-Lan config entry is not loaded

set_data_error.message: An error occurred while sending the data to the BSB-Lan device

set_operation_mode_error.message: An error occurred while setting the operation mode

set_preset_mode_error.message: Can't set preset mode to {preset_mode} when HVAC mode is not set to auto

set_temperature_error.message: An error occurred while setting the temperature

setup_auth_error.message: Authentication failed while retrieving static device data

setup_connection_error.message: Failed to retrieve static device data from BSB-Lan device at {host}

setup_general_error.message: An unknown error occurred while retrieving static device data

sync_time.description: Synchronize Home Assistant time to the BSB-Lan device. Only updates if device time differs from Home Assistant time.

config_entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the BSB-Lan device to sync time for.
config_entry_id.name: Config entry

sync_time.name: Sync time
